criteria.name: archetype
criteria.detail: got "Wavetable Synthesizer", expected contains one of [wavetable]

visionAnswers.palette: The interface predominantly uses dark gray and black as its background. The accent color is a lighter gray, and the LED glow is a bright cyan/light blue.
